name: Coffee
description: Coffee is Uganda’s most important export crop.

name: Tea
description: Tea plantations thrive in Uganda’s cool highland climate.

name: Maize
description: Maize is widely grown and used as a staple food.

name: Cassava
description: Cassava is a drought-resistant staple crop.

name: Banana
description: Bananas are widely used to make matoke.

name: Beans
description: Beans are an important protein source.

name: Rice
description: Rice farming is expanding in irrigated areas.

name: Sorghum
description: Used for porridge and traditional drinks.

name: Millet
description: Millet is used for traditional foods and porridge.

name: Sugarcane
description: Sugarcane is used in sugar production.

name: Groundnuts
description: Groundnuts are used in sauces and snacks.

name: Sunflower
description: Sunflower seeds are processed into cooking oil.

name: Sweet Potato
description: Sweet potatoes are widely consumed in Uganda.
